title: CancelBreaks
description: The Cancel Breaks mod helps Minecraft players avoid accidentally destroying blocks that do not drop when destroyed or are not desirable to be destroyed.
body: The Cancel Breaks mod helps Minecraft players avoid accidentally destroying blocks that are not drop when destroyed or that are undesirable to be destroyed. Blocks cannot be destroyed only in survival mode. Blocks: Amethyst Drusus, Suspicious Sand, Suspicious Gravel.
